hero.title: Transform Your Data into Stunning Presentations
hero.subtitle: Create professional, AI-powered presentations in minutes. Simply upload your data and let our AI generate beautiful slides automatically.
hero.painText: Hours in PowerPoint formatting data? Take back control.
hero.body: Import Excel, CSV, PDF or Google Sheets. Our AI analyzes, structures and automatically generates professional presentations — in seconds.
hero.note: No credit card required · 3 free reports per month

features.title: Why Choose DataPresent
features.aiDesc: Our AI analyzes your data and creates meaningful insights and visualizations automatically.
features.templatesDesc: Choose from a wide range of beautifully designed templates that fit any presentation style.
features.exportDesc: Export your presentations in multiple formats including PowerPoint, PDF, and more.

page.title: Pricing
page.subtitle: Plans for every need. No hidden fees.

items.q: Can I change my plan at any time?
items.a: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes take effect immediately and you are billed pro-rata for the current month.

items.q: What payment methods do you accept?
items.a: We accept credit cards (Visa, Mastercard), SEPA transfers, and invoice payment for Team and Agency plans.
No commitment required. All plans are monthly and you can cancel anytime. Discounts are available for annual subscriptions.

items.q: What happens if I exceed my report quota?
items.a: You will be notified when you reach 80% of your quota. If you exceed it, you can upgrade your plan or wait until the next month when your quota resets.

jsonld.name: DataPresent
jsonld.description: Generate professional presentations from your data with AI

about.title: Bring your data to life, naturally
about.subtitle: DataPresent was born from a simple frustration: spending hours aligning slides when the real value is in the data. We built the tool we wish we had.

story.title: A story of data and lost time
story.p1: Alexandre spent 15 hours a week preparing presentations for his clients. Not analyzing data — formatting it. Adjusting charts, reformatting tables, hunting for the right font. The real value — the analysis, the story — was buried in layout work.
story.p2: In 2024, he gathered a team of designers, AI engineers and analysts to build a radically different solution: a tool that understands your data and transforms it into clear slides, without friction, without compromising quality.
story.p3: Today, DataPresent helps hundreds of professionals create impactful presentations in seconds, not hours. No black box. No generic template. Just your data, told with precision.

values.title: Our values
values.subtitle: Three pillars guide every decision we make

cta.title: Ready to transform your data?
cta.body: Join hundreds of professionals saving time on their presentations.
